// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import "strings"

// POSTPageOrgUpdate references /org/{org}/team/{team}/update/
func POSTPageOrgUpdate(org string, team string, query QueryPOSTPageOrgUpdate) string {
	anyQuery := query.Role != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/org/") + len(org) + len("/team/") + len(team) + len("/update/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Role != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("role=") + len(query.Role)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/org/")
	b.WriteString(org)
	b.WriteString("/team/")
	b.WriteString(team)
	b.WriteString("/update/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Role != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		n++
		_ = n
		b.WriteString("role=")
		b.WriteString(query.Role)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageOrgUpdate struct {
	Role string `query:"role"`
}
